title: Chapter 1 · First Website
subtitle: Build and publish a simple multi-page website.
description: Learn how to prompt clearly, create listing and detail pages, add product-like features, and deploy a real beginner website.

rank_reward.name: AI Website Builder
rank_reward.subtitle: Can build and publish static websites with AI

completion_message: You have shipped a real website with multiple pages, usable navigation, and product-style details. That is the first meaningful milestone.
